title: Clarify and repair the learning spine
objective: Make the course order visibly intentional and ensure the prerequisite graph matches the taught sequence.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page explains the progressive learning phases and their synthesis milestones
The post-training bridge is a real prerequisite rather than an orphaned lesson
Advanced material is identified as specialization after the shared core
details: Document the skeptical audit, add progression metadata and home-page learning spine, and repair lesson 21/22 ordering and dependencies.

title: Expose knowledge transfer between lessons
objective: Tell learners what earlier idea they are reusing, what new capability they are adding, and why the next lesson follows.
acceptanceCriteria: Every lesson with prerequisites presents a concrete knowledge bridge
Every lesson previews how its knowledge connects to the next step
Prerequisite navigation remains functional and accessible
details: Replace the thin prerequisite strip with scaffolded carry-forward cards and enrich lesson pagination with a next-connection explanation.

title: Add a code-learning layer
objective: Give students enough concrete code to connect conceptual mechanisms to implementable systems.
acceptanceCriteria: Every track contains multiple lesson-specific code walkthroughs
Core mathematical and architectural bottlenecks have runnable Python examples
Systems and safety topics use explicit pseudocode or configuration where executable code would mislead
Each walkthrough asks for a prediction and provides an observation plus a modification task
details: Create a typed code-example registry, render accessible code notebooks in lesson guides, and expose code coverage on the course home page.

title: Audit the revised learning system
objective: Prove the revised curriculum is progressive, complete, legible, and free of regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated tests validate ordering, prerequisite closure, knowledge bridges, learning phases, and code coverage
Production build, lint, and complete test suite pass
Desktop and phone browser checks show the new progression and code components without overflow or console errors
details: Add progression-focused tests, run all checks, inspect home and representative lessons in the browser, and iterate on gaps.
